# terrible_f5networks_f5_modules_bigip_message_routing_route (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Specifies the name of the static route.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) The user-defined description of the static route.
- `dst_address` (String) Specifies the destination address of the route. Setting the attribute to an empty string will create a wildcard matching all message destination-addresses, which is the default when creating a new route.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `partition` (String) Device partition to create route object on.
- `peer_selection_mode` (String) Specifies the method to use when selecting a peer from the provided list of `peers`.
- `peers` (String) Specifies a list of ltm messagerouting-peer objects. The specified peer must be on the same partition as the route.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `src_address` (String) Specifies the source address of the route. Setting the attribute to an empty string will create a wildcard matching all message source-addresses, which is the default when creating a new route.
- `state` (String) When `present`, ensures the route exists. When `absent`, ensures the route is removed.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `type` (String) Parameter used to specify the type of the route to manage. Default setting is `generic` with more options coming.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
